home.welcome_text: Maruvayil Sree ShivaParvathy Kudumba Kshetra is a 300+ year old family temple nestled in Maruveyil, Calicut District, Kerala. Reconstructed in February 2020, this sacred space continues to bless generations of devotees.
home.about_text: This ancient temple, over three centuries old, is dedicated to the divine family of Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvathi. The temple was beautifully reconstructed in February 2020 and continues its tradition of monthly poojas that include Nivedhyam, Neelanjanam, Maala, and Deeparadhana.
home.monthly_pooja_desc: Join our monthly pooja and receive divine blessings for your entire family
home.monthly_expenses_desc: Your contribution helps sustain this sacred tradition

temple.title: Temple Details
temple.history_text: The Maruvayil Sree ShivaParvathy Kudumba Kshetra is more than 300 years old, standing as a testament to the deep spiritual heritage of the Maruvayil family. For generations, this sacred space has been the center of worship and devotion for the family and surrounding community.
temple.reconstruction_text: After years of dedicated effort, the temple was beautifully reconstructed and consecrated in February 2020. The reconstruction preserved the ancient traditions while creating a more welcoming space for devotees. The event was a landmark moment for all devotees and family members.
temple.location_address: Maruveyil House, Post Kunhumakara, Via Chombala, Vadagara Taluq, Calicut District, Kerala
temple.timeline_founded_desc: Maruvayil Sree ShivaParvathy Kudumba Kshetra established, over 300 years ago
temple.timeline_reconstruction_desc: Temple beautifully reconstructed and reconscerated in February 2020
temple.timeline_trust_desc: Maruvayil Sree ShivaParvathy Kudumba Kshetra Charitable Trust formalized

pooja.title: Monthly Pooja
pooja.subtitle: Register your family for divine blessings
pooja.about_text: Our monthly pooja is a sacred tradition that has been maintained for generations. It is performed to seek blessings for the entire family and ensure their well-being and prosperity.
pooja.register_step1: Create an account on this website
pooja.register_step2: Add your family members in the dashboard
pooja.register_step3: Mark each member to include in pooja
pooja.register_step4: Contact us at maruvayiltemple@gmail.com to confirm
